inputs.label: Current Wear (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Measured wear depth on the cutting tooth

inputs.label: Applied Load (kN)
inputs.businessContext: Force applied on the tooth during operation

inputs.label: Rotation Speed (rpm)
inputs.businessContext: Rotational speed of the cutter head

inputs.label: Material Hardness (HB)
inputs.businessContext: Brinell hardness of the material being cut

inputs.label: Wear Limit (mm)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum permissible wear before tooth replacement
